rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF QUEENIE ANDERSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required for failure to address Examiner's Notes, which contained the following issues: a. Petitioner alleges that Decedent died on 9/9/07, but the order for probate indicates she died on 9/23/07. b. The personal representatives or, if none, the successors in interest of Joanne Anderson and Donald Anderson, have not been identified to determine who is entitled to distribution and/or notice. Please be sure to specify whether personal representatives have been appointed. NOTE: the recently e-filed 13100 affidavit must be filed in person. c. In par. 43, Petitioner requests a reserve for, among other things, to pay any additional attorneys' fees. No additional attorney fees may be paid without further petition. d. Notice of Hearing has not been filed. e. The declaration re: xo fees referenced in par. 42 has not been filed. f. Ending balance of cash must be verified [Local Rule 14.34D]. Please also make sure to file a verified declaration pursuant to Local Rule 14.59A certifying that the original document(s) will be available for inspection in the same way as documents are maintained under CRC 2.257. g. Proposed order has not been filed. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF EILEEN O'LEARY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Some required documents are still missing or have not been filed correctly. (1) Three Inventory and Appraisals on file. The most recent (12/23/25) I&A should be filed as a supplement, as there is already a final I&A on file from 12/19/2025. Also, the amount on the 12/23/25 I&A appears incorrect ($20,388.17? $20383.17?). Proper correction is needed. (2) Proof of mailing of Notice of Filing Inventory and Appraisal and How to Object to the Inventory or Appraised Value of the Property [GC-240] (3) Proof of recording of Letters of Conservatorship. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELAINE M. MULLINS SURVIVOR’S TRUST UNDER THE Edward J. Mullins and Elaine M. Mullins Revocable
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For: (1) Order For Accounting; (2) Order For Suspension, Removal And Replacement Of Trustee; (3) Order To Quiet Title And For Recovery Of
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/6/26. Examiner's Notes emailed with the following issues: 1. The purported 2024 Amendment has not been filed. 2. Victoria Mullins, who is listed as a TIC interest holder in the subject real property, was not listed in the petition and was not provided personal service under Probate Code 17203(b). 3. Item 4 was not marked on the notice filed on 12/3/25 (re: PC 859 relief). 4. Petitioner requests relief regarding the parent trust, but this matter only pertains to the survivor's trust. 5. 5951 California is already titled in the names of the petitioners in the way it should be. Please allege why a confirmation of what is already true is needed. 6. Personal property that is the subject of this petition has not been sufficiently described in the petition or the notice.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS HOMER WILLIAMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/16/2016 for the following issues to be cleared before 3/6/2026: 1. Need a verified supplement addressing the following: (1) Identify the deceased ancestor through whom second-generation heirs (nieces and nephews) inherit, and specify the ancestor's relationship to the decedent when such heirs are listed in Attachment 8. For each niece or nephew, indicate their parent (either the predeceased sister, Laura, or the brother, Robert). (2) State whether the predeceased nephew, John, died with or without issue. 2. Need an allegation re: Penny J. Alarid's address being a PO Box only, rather than a street address. Prob. Code 1215(a)(3). If she receives mail at the PO Box, her relevant affidavit is to be filed.
